title: Senior Project Manager
description:
About Cynapse

Cynapse is a leading AI software company specializing in enterprise-grade Video Intelligence Solutions Powered by Generative AI, tailored to meet the unique challenges of various industries. Our vertical-specific solutions empower organizations to enhance safety, operational efficiency, and security in complex environments such as roads, seaports, airports, and cities. By combining advanced Vision AI with Generative AI, we continually push the boundaries of video analytics, delivering insights and automation that transform operations.

Led by a global team with a proven track record of scaling startups into market leaders, we foster innovation, collaboration, and diverse perspectives. Headquartered from US, Cynapse serves clients worldwide, redefining what's possible with video intelligence.

Job Description

We are seeking a talented and highly motivated Senior Project Manager to join our AI Product group. You will conform to high standards of planning and management, working in a cutting-edge, dynamic and professionally challenging

Responsibilities

The Senior Project Manager is responsible for the delivery of Vision AI Software Projects/Programs in Singapore and other countries as well as managing (indirectly) technical and operational team members:

  • Acting as a single point of contact for assigned projects
  • Lead the project planning, resourcing and scheduling, define project tasks and milestones.
  • Ensure projects are delivered on time, and provide timely reports on project status and activities
  • Oversee requirements gathering and validation, solution development and testing, deployment, UAT and solution commissioning
  • Manage vendors, subcontractors, partners and other stakeholders
  • Assist overseas project manager counterpart (in EST time zone) with project delivery.
  • Involved in the Pre-sale and Sale stages
  • Optional: Manage/Guide PM Intern

Qualifications

  • Degree in IT/Engineering/Project-Management
  • Scrum Master and/or PMP certification (Mandatory)
  • At least 4 years of experience in IT Project Management, preferably with external customers, at the scale of either: 4 or more man-years / at least $250K budget
  • Experience in delivering projects/programs with multi-phases and compressed time frame.
  • Experience with vendors and partners management
  • Innovative, motivated and a quick learner
  • Ability to work well in a team and take end-to-end ownership of activities
  • Attention to detail, curiosity, and passion for technology
  • Bonus: AI-related technical background/experience with software development

Benefits

  • Competitive base salary and a generous stock option package
  • Unique opportunity to work with a talented global team on cutting edge technologies
  • Exciting work environment with flexible hours

Due to the nature of the role, the position is considered for candidates who are only based in Singapore

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $6,000.00 - $8,500.00 per month

Benefits:

  • Health insurance

Experience:

  • IT Project Management: 4 years (Required)
  • vendors and partners management: 2 years (Required)
  • multi-phased projects: 2 years (Required)

License/Certification:

  • PMP (Required)
  • Certified Scrum Master (Preferred)

Work Location: In person

postedCompany.description:
Cynapse is an awarded AI Software Product company specializing in Enterprise-grade Vision AI software products in the Smart City, Transportation and Homeland Security verticals.

The company is led by globally renowned experts who previously headed large groups at Microsoft and Intel. The company HQ is located in Singapore (One North Area) and we operate in over 10 countries.

We are committed to creating a supportive work environment that encourages proactiveness, honesty and integrity, agility, excellence, taking ownership and making continuous improvements. We're looking for individuals who share our values and are excited to join us in our mission.
postedCompany.name: CYNAPSE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
